courses.heading: Walk the whole path with us!
courses.subheading: Local and international programmes: National Curriculum, IB, IGCSE, Cambridge. In-person in Baku and online for students abroad.

results.heading: Admissions & achievements
results.subheading: Where TED Academy graduates get in

subjects.heading: Subjects & directions
subjects.subheading: Mathematics, languages, SAT, IELTS, DİM, IT and Study Abroad — in person in Baku and online.

courses.q: What courses and directions does TED Academy offer?
courses.a: Mathematics and sciences, languages (English, IELTS, TOEFL, Russian, Azerbaijani), SAT and DİM exam prep, IT (Full-stack, Frontend, Backend, UI/UX, Data Analytics) and Study Abroad — for grades 1–11 and adults.

location.q: Where is TED Academy located in Baku?
location.a: Our educational center is in Baku at Seyfəddin Dağlı 51. Lessons are held in person at the center and online for students abroad.

languages.q: What languages are classes taught in?
languages.a: We teach in Azerbaijani, Russian and English, so you can pick the language that suits your child best.

trial.q: How do I sign up for a trial lesson?
trial.a: Leave a request through the form on this site or call us — the consultation is free, and we'll pick a teacher and a convenient time.

exams.q: Do you prepare students for SAT, IELTS and DİM?
exams.a: Yes. We prepare for SAT (Math & Verbal), IELTS, TOEFL, Duolingo and the DİM graduation and entrance exams, using our own textbooks and regular mock exams.

online.a: Yes — every direction is available online with a personal study plan and a digital app, so students anywhere in the world can study with us.
